text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You bet I am! You know why? It's<n>because I had
the most wonderful<n>dream!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I dreamed that I was with Shiraoki on<n>Mount Fuji
eating eggplant and<n>watching the hawks fly!
That's all the<n>ingredients needed for the most
powerful soup for the soul!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to that, I'm well rested, well<n>chuffed, and,
well, just happy to be<n>here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think Shiraoki must have instilled me<n>with the
power to do my best! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think a good night's sleep probably<n>played more
of a role than divine<n>intervention... but either way,
I'm glad<n>she's rested.
